# Total Coloring Lean

> A Lean 4 formalization of total coloring and its matching-plus-star auxiliary problem. The declaration `TotalColoring.exists_valid_assignment_of_highDegree` proves that every finite graph satisfying `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree` has a valid total assignment with palette `ExtensionPalette (G.maxDegree + 1)`, which has `G.maxDegree + 3` colors. It includes the empty vertex type and uses no parity hypothesis. The library does not prove the Total Coloring Conjecture, a `Delta + 2` result, the manuscript's still-unlocked main theorem, or novelty.

Treat commit `310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b` as authoritative for the all-orders auxiliary source, `9bdcdec1a872ccef42cfd79e791fe39c22a1beeb` for the conditional transfer, `343b7b87b82532a9d8eade6d4cd43679eae1f7c9` for the supplied-witness numerical layer, and `a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20` for the supplied equitable-partition adapter. This branch adds the complement-matching existence and exact-trimming route, the empty-vertex assignment, and the terminal theorem `TotalColoring.exists_valid_assignment_of_highDegree`. Its exact hypothesis is `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree`; its conclusion is existence of a valid `Assignment G (ExtensionPalette (G.maxDegree + 1))`. Do not add even-order, nonempty, regularity, sufficiently-large, or other hypotheses that the declaration does not have, and do not drop the explicit density hypothesis.

Distribution state at this revision: `main` contains the conditional transfer through merge commit `76cd929d13168485ef4b9b43b5e684ab9687d87d`; this candidate adds the terminal high-degree theorem for draft PR #8, but the theorem is not on `main` unless that PR has since been merged. Release v0.1.0 predates these result layers.

Numerical provenance remains split exactly: private verification source commit `acb08de85f99c7db578e042e67d3f172c5599fcd`, tree `7207e2a282ff829fba9737e93154f46f385ef879`, source-archive SHA-256 `5c3bef3720abeb62d0c437fbc638fe1848059892fbe09fe0c437c942c16baf5c`; identical numerical Lean content at public integration commit `343b7b87b82532a9d8eade6d4cd43679eae1f7c9`, tree `9863f500b2671048f4dc386f497eb6523b065099`. Jobs `5387926`, `5387929`, `5387933`, and `5387978` passed; GitHub Lean CI `29612994477` and docs `29612994502` succeeded. Diagnostic jobs `5387930` and `5387932` are not receipts or proof failures.

The adapter is commit `a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20`, exact tree `0e9b04a2acabae0cb0612e5e3cbf0344cc2f94f7`, source-archive SHA-256 `736db25ca7d25fb0eed8431e435e80bc94287e1ae88f9dea806ddba2c1b544f4`, and outgoing-cache SHA-256 `94456901604a3b6ecde49368a4ba285fda03ecdca856b0c37f207624527e037a`. Adapter leaf `5387980`, Nova full build `5387981`, and high-memory full/Quickstart/leanchecker trust `5387982` all completed with exit `0:0`. PR #8 remains draft.

Terminal proof-tree provenance: exact Git tree `4624044788ab42c0dc116cfbf7f38c696065263c`, source-archive SHA-256 `302bc3f00bf5d8c1ce563d2bc84d1370e627c81d219e8d8085b286a21d530077`. Five separate full-build, Quickstart, and leanchecker replays (`5388311` through `5388315`) completed with exit `0:0` and empty stderr. These receipts certify that proof tree only, not any later publishable tree; certification of a later tree requires its own exact-tree gate and public CI, recorded externally against that tree.

## Essential

- [Machine-readable claim boundary](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/agent/pair-singleton-extension/docs/claim-boundary.json): Proof-branch declaration, scope, palette, exclusions, and trust facts; the default-branch copy is older until merge.
- [Exact proof status](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/agent/pair-singleton-extension/docs/proof-status.md): Proof-branch human-readable checked result and non-results.
- [Curated theorem index](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/agent/pair-singleton-extension/docs/theorem-index.md): Proof-branch public declarations and their roles.
- [Guide for coding agents](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/agent/pair-singleton-extension/docs/for-agents.md): Proof-branch authority order, safe prompts, and claim-audit rules.
- [Repository contract](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/agent/pair-singleton-extension/AGENTS.md): Proof-branch rules for modifications.

## Source

- [Umbrella import](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/43a49aa6f7e7d8cf5c95a22a71a3a92a02db7c45/TotalColoring.lean): Direct imports for the complete proof integration.
- [High-degree terminal theorem](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/43a49aa6f7e7d8cf5c95a22a71a3a92a02db7c45/TotalColoring/HighDegreeTotalColoring.lean): From `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree`, constructs a valid total assignment with `G.maxDegree + 3` colors, including the empty vertex type and without parity.
- [All-orders auxiliary terminal module](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/CriticalAllDClosure.lean): Critical contradiction and finite extraction theorem.
- [Conditional transfer](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/9bdcdec1a872ccef42cfd79e791fe39c22a1beeb/TotalColoring/AuxiliaryTransfer.lean): Composition with a supplied extension and explicit selector membership.
- [Supplied pair/singleton extension](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/pull/8): Concrete auxiliary graph, conflict-preserving extension, exact selector coverage, matching-plus-full-star structure, exact degree/class-count identities, and conditional high-degree `IsAuxiliaryClassMember`.
- [Complement matching route](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/43a49aa6f7e7d8cf5c95a22a71a3a92a02db7c45/TotalColoring/HighDegreeComplementMatching.lean): Obtains the matching needed by the pair/singleton reduction from the high-degree hypothesis.
- [Exact matching trim](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/43a49aa6f7e7d8cf5c95a22a71a3a92a02db7c45/TotalColoring/MatchingExact.lean): Trims a sufficiently large matching graph to the required exact edge count.
- [Empty assignment](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/43a49aa6f7e7d8cf5c95a22a71a3a92a02db7c45/TotalColoring/EmptyAssignment.lean): Supplies the empty-vertex base case used by the terminal theorem.
- [Supplied equitable-partition adapter](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20/TotalColoring/EquitablePairSingleton.lean): Constructs the pair/singleton witness and exact `J.card = D` from a supplied equitable independent partition, then proves the earlier conditional high-degree `Delta + 3` total-assignment theorem.
- [Auxiliary class](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/AuxiliaryClass.lean): Definition of `InAuxiliaryClass`.
- [Conditional decoder](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Auxiliary.lean): Structural extension interface and total-assignment decoder.
- [Semantic coloring predicates](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Total.lean): Total- and edge-coloring assignments.
- [Certificate checkers](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Certificate.lean): Executable Boolean checkers and soundness theorems.

## Optional

- [Getting started](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/getting-started/): Reproducible setup and build commands.
- [Proof architecture](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/architecture/): Module-level route through the formal proof.
- [Trust and reproduction](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/trust/): Kernel, checker, parser, and CI boundaries.
- [Compiled Quickstart](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/agent/pair-singleton-extension/docs/examples/Quickstart.lean): Copyable proof-branch declarations for the final exact-tree gate.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution workflow.
- [Citation metadata](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Software citation record.
